interpretation: A single latent factor (backward-looking institutional pricing of forward physical climate exposure) accounts for the cross-channel covariance with CFI > 0.95 and RMSEA < 0.06, the conventional Hu and Bentler (1999) cutoffs for adequate fit. The framework is structurally identifiable. The common-factor share (~40%) is consistent with the channel-specific shocks each adding their own variance.
